response.overview: Maria Helena Noronha Feyo is credited with two films, both shot by her husband, José Maria Noronha Feyo, director of Diamang (Angola Diamond Company). They depict children's parties conceived, written, staged, with music, costumes, and decorations by Maria Helena, in which the children of the company's employees participate. The recording, filmed on 16mm color film, in a fixed, wide, and sequential shot, simply captures the event – ​​without sound. However, the program for the parties, with musical accompaniment details, is preserved.
response.title: Teatro Infantil - Artes de Magia
